data.title: Notice of annual general meeting in Truecaller AB
data.description: On April 20, 2026, in Stockholm, Truecaller AB, with registration number 559278-2774, issued an invitation to its shareholders. The official language of the invitation is Swedish; any discrepancies between the Swedish and English texts will be resolved in favor of the Swedish text. Shareholders are summoned to attend the meeting.

data.title: Princess Cruises' Newest Ship, Star Princess, Makes Historic First Transit of the Panama Canal
data.description: In Fort Lauderdale, Florida on April 20, 2026, Princess Cruises, a renowned cruise brand, marked a significant achievement as their latest ship, Star Princess, successfully traversed the Panama Canal for the first time. The voyage of Star Princess through the canal highlighted a major milestone for the company.

data.title: Chicken Salad Chick Reports Record Q1 Franchise Growth, Nearly 50% Increase Year Over Year
data.description: A fast-casual chicken salad restaurant concept, Chicken Salad Chick, has achieved its strongest quarter in company history in 2026 by selling 52 new restaurants. This marks a record-setting start for the company in the year. The business, based in Atlanta, is the sole fast-casual concept specializing in chicken salad.

data.title: How Trump Sent Psychedelics-Tied Compass Pathways And Others Flying
data.description: Compass Pathways saw a significant increase in its stock value on Monday following President Donald Trump's signing of an executive order related to psychedelic drugs. The boost in the stock was noticeable, representing a promising development for Compass Pathways and other companies in this sector. This event has generated positive momentum for Compass Pathways, indicating potential growth and advancement in psychedelic drug-related investments.

data.title: United, American Merger Talks Dashed Ahead Of Results. Alaska Air Earnings Due.
data.description: American Airlines has decided to decline discussions of a potential merger with United Airlines as they approach their earnings report. On the other hand, Alaska Air is set to disclose their financial results on Monday. The news of United and American Airlines abandoning merger negotiations coincides with the anticipation of their upcoming earnings reports, while investors are also awaiting Alaska Air's earnings announcement.

data.title: Princeton Battlefield Society and Somerset Patriots Team Up to Celebrate the 250th Anniversary of the U.S.A.
data.description: Princeton Battlefield Society (PBS) and Somerset Patriots baseball team have joined forces to commemorate the nation's 250th anniversary during Independence Day celebrations. PBS will be present at the July 5th game, sharing insights into New Jersey's revolutionary history, while the Somerset Patriots will wear unique Semiquincentennial jerseys for the Double-A baseball game against the Hartford Yard Goats. Additionally, the Patriots will be contributing a portion of the game’s proceeds to support the event.

data.title: These Analysts Revise Their Forecasts On Truist Financial After Q1 Earnings
data.description: Truist Financial Corporation (NYSE: TFC) exceeded expectations with their first-quarter earnings report. Their earnings per share were $1.09, surpassing the estimated $1.00. The company also reported a revenue of $5.19 billion, beating the estimated $5.17 billion. CEO Bill Rogers expressed satisfaction with the strong quarter, noting a 25% increase in earnings per share compared to the first quarter of 2025. Truist revised their fiscal-year 2026 revenue guidance to $21.32 billion, as opposed to the previous range of $21.32 billion to $21.52 billion. More details can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Piraeus and Accenture Team Up to Launch ΑΙ Hub in the Greek Banking Sector Powered by Anthropic
data.description: In Athens, Greece, Piraeus (ATHEX: TPEIR) and Accenture (NYSE: ACN) have unveiled a major development in their partnership with the introduction of an exclusive AI Hub, backed by Anthropic. This initiative is aimed at boosting Piraeus' comprehensive AI transformation and establishing a new standard for AI-powered banking in Greece. The AI Hub serves as a core platform for creating, expanding, and implementing advanced AI solutions throughout Piraeus' complete operations. Through the cohesion of their expertise, Piraeus and Accenture are leveraging this AI Hub to accelerate the integration of cutting-edge technologies across the bank's processes.

data.title: Ally Financial Analysts Raise Their Forecasts After Better-Than-Expected Q1 Earnings
data.description: Ally Financial Inc, trading on NYSE under ticker ALLY, exceeded analysts' expectations with its first-quarter financial results. The company reported earnings of $1.11 per share, surpassing the estimated 93 cents per share. Quarterly sales stood at $2.179 billion, higher than the anticipated $2.138 billion. Following the report, Ally Financial's shares saw a 2.1% increase, trading at $46.32 on Monday. Analysts adjusted their price targets for Ally Financial post-earnings, with Barclays analyst Jason Goldberg maintaining a position on the company. For more details, visit Benzinga.com.

data.title: Novata Expands Regulatory Navigator to Simplify Sustainability Regulations
data.description: Novata, the top sustainability management platform for private markets, based in New York, revealed today a major enhancement to its Novata Regulatory Navigator. The platform now offers a Premium tier aimed at assisting organizations in alleviating the burden of monitoring regulatory information, enabling them to make well-informed decisions. With an escalation in the intricacy of global sustainability regulations, businesses and investors encounter the difficulty of discerning relevant regulations and their timelines. The updated Regulatory Navigator aims to provide clarity and simplicity in navigating these regulations.

data.title: Axalta Launches Zencore™ Cabinet Coating System
data.description: Utilizing the reliable Zenamel™ technology, Zencore™ streamlines finishing processes and ensures long-lasting, uniform outcomes for major manufacturers in North America with high production volumes.

data.title: BitMine Immersion Technologies makes big move, purchasing $235 million worth of Ethereum, boosting total holdings to close to 5 million ETH.
data.description: Last week, BitMine Immersion Technologies made a significant investment by acquiring Ethereum worth $235 million, raising their total Ethereum holdings to almost 5 million ETH.
